title: Kill Indicator
description: Adds an indicator on the action bar about what you hurt/killed, like their HP.
body:
This is a very simple mod that shows on your action bar (located above your hotbar) what you just killed. This works for not only melee, but also ranged attacks. The name and HP of who or what you hurt or killed along with its HP will appear in white as displayed in the video below!  
###### This mod is extremely small, but more updates to UI are soon to come!

![Example](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeHhscDBhN2k5bGllOW9peWVyeGNycnIwaXN0ZnNqb2ExZDI0ZjM5eiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/GC16LZQfVdqoeTfi1D/giphy.gif)

### Fabric ONLY
Forge is planned!

Also on [CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kill-indicator), though it may stop being supported soon.
